translated: This product will include a special rarity, "Secret Serial," featuring a serial number.

no ChuChu Liella!

Love Live! Superstar!! Yu-Yu-Yu Lunchtime Broadcasting Station Liella!
Radio. It's almost time to say goodbye.
Here is the information for our upcoming broadcasts.
For the 266th episode on Tuesday, March 31st, we'll continue to have Yabushima Akane (voice of Yoneme Mei) as our guest.
And for the 267th episode on Tuesday, April 7th, we'll welcome Okuma Wakana (voice of Shiki Wakana) as a guest for a "Toma-Kano-Shiki" episode.
We're looking forward to your messages!
So, how did you enjoy today's broadcast?
How was it?
How was it?
Ding, ding, ding!
What? Is it always like this?
Ding, ding, ding!
Are you okay, Sakura?
Oh no, oh no, oh no, oh no.
Saku... Sakura, you really surprised me just now.
I didn't expect you to join in on that side.
I was just thinking, "When did Sakura become like this?"
She's worried about you.
I couldn't think of a comeback, so I thought I'd just join in with one of you.
That's wonderful.
Yes, yes, wonderful.
Yabushima was looking so confused just now.
Saku... Sakura got someone worried about her.
Being worried about is the most embarrassing thing.
Anyway, how was it today?
Well, I got to share my thoughts in great detail...
Or rather, I got to talk a lot.
Is that okay?
Thank you so much.
Everyone wanted to hear it.
We'll talk more next week too.
That's right.
Yeah. I wonder how long we can keep talking about the 7th Live.
We're planning for about three years.
Roughly, yeah.
We'll keep going until we've covered every song.
Oh, then we'll do every single song.

We'll run over.
We'll run over, we'll run over.
